title: I am very interested in learning about a 2011 event
display_title: I am very interested in learning about a 2011 event
wikitext:
[]: I am very interested in learning about a 2011 event....             Quote Post by photoxander » Thu Aug 09, 2018 2:53 pm Hi! I'm actually I guess new to the forum! Huge fan of Evangelion. Been a stalker of the forums for a bit now, never had anything worth making an account to say. SO here is what i wanted to learn about! I have been for a bit now reading the events in 2011 when Amanda Winn Lee was here on the forum to discuss the issues with the dub, and answer so questions. The post "hi everyone" lasted 3 days before it was ended after Amanda left because of a member named HAL. What is clear to me is whatever he said was rude,mean,unprofessional, and much more. Some said he was only voicing a chunk of Eva fans feeling towards her and the Dubs. The page where he says these things was deleted. A page of the story missing. I believe 20 posts which i can not see. I do not want to discuss if what HAL said/did was right or wrong, because boy is it discussed in other posts like "The AWL Incident" I only wish to learn more about what was said and to see if there was any screenshots of this missing page. If this post is not ok (Bringing up old drama and refueling any fires) I will happily delete this post! Just interested in this juicy piece of USA Eva history.

[]: Re: I am very interested in learning about a 2011 event....             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Aug 09, 2018 3:07 pm Some things are better off left hidden. While I disagree with her treatment of Eva, as more time goes by, the more I sympathize with her. People crossed the line all too easy, and fans' messages to her got straight up personal and nasty at times. Therein lies your answer.

[]: Re: I am very interested in learning about a 2011 event....             Quote Post by photoxander » Thu Aug 09, 2018 3:12 pm I understand. If the Eva Monkey says to drop the search, then i best be dropping it. Thanks for the response! - xander

[]: Re: I am very interested in learning about a 2011 event....             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Aug 09, 2018 3:23 pm photoxander wrote: I understand. If the Eva Monkey says to drop the search, then i best be dropping it. Thanks for the response! - xander

[]: Re: I am very interested in learning about a 2011 event....             Quote Post by photoxander » Thu Aug 09, 2018 3:26 pm I hope so! I mean i would love to ask questions, but without to much hostility. I don't feel like it will happen. But if it did that would be amazing! It is interesting to see what she is up to now. like her youtube channel about marijuana. Crazy stuff! Well thanks again! -Xander
